global.title: resource-instance model tracks provisioned resource lifecycle
global.content:
# resource-instance model tracks provisioned resource lifecycle

`powerhouse/resource-instance` represents a provisioned resource for a customer. It has a detailed lifecycle with provisioning, suspension, and termination states.

## State Shape

```graphql
type ResourceInstanceState {
    resourceTemplateId: PHID       # → ResourceTemplate
    customerId: PHID               # → customer identity (external)
    name: String
    profile: ResourceProfile       # { id: PHID!, documentType: String! }
    status: InstanceStatus!        # DRAFT | PROVISIONING | ACTIVE | SUSPENDED | TERMINATED
    configuration: [InstanceFacet!]!
    # ... lifecycle timestamps, suspension details
}
```

## Modules (2)

| Module | Operations | Purpose |
|--------|-----------|---------|
| instance-management | 14 | Initialize, update info, status transitions, provisioning, suspension (non-payment/maintenance), termination |
| configuration-management | 4 | Set/remove/update instance facets, apply configuration changes |

## Key References

- `resourceTemplateId: PHID` → ResourceTemplate
- `customerId: PHID` → customer identity (external)
- `profile.id: PHID` → external profile document
- SubscriptionInstance.`resource.id` → references this model

---

global.description: 19 operations across 2 modules — manages instance lifecycle (DRAFT → PROVISIONING → ACTIVE → SUSPENDED → TERMINATED) with facet configuration
